title: OH NO NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM
display_title: OH NO NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM
wikitext:
[]: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Wed Sep 02, 2009 8:30 pm So as most of you know, the amazing Berserk Eva Unit-01 roar was taken out and replaced in the original series when they dubbed the English version because the Eva roar was on the same audio track as the Japanese dub or whatever. Anyway, I was thinking and what if that happens again in the Rebuild 1.0? Can anyone who has seen the English dub confirm this yet? Even more troubling: I honestly don't care THAT much about the Berserk Eva roar. But Ramiel's AMAZING laser death screech when it fires at Shinji in the Japanese version of 1.0? FUCKING EPIC! I had the headphones on full blast when I heard that and it sent chills down my spine. I am traveling to Georgia soon to see RoE 1.0 in English in theaters and I am going to be sorely disappointed if they took that epic screech away :(

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Wed Sep 02, 2009 11:12 pm Ramiel shrieks pretty well in this one too. So does Yui. I think there was a voice actor for Eva-Unit-01 listed in the credits

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Sep 03, 2009 9:21 pm Is it JUST as terrifying? Man I don't know what I'd do without it. It might ruin the entire climax

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Sep 03, 2009 9:35 pm I hear yah there, the dub roar of NGE was amazing and simply said BEAST. The one from rebuild during the Sach fight kinda sounded like a computer being raped by a dog.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:34 pm So,did they ruin Her roar in Rebuild then?I mean,it's no big deal.But I hope the roar still gives you the feeling that the beast was released.If they screwed that up then they might as well just give up.Cant mess with the berserk scene.Those scenes typically tell you that you have released the beast from within .

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:15 pm Eva 04 wrote: I mean,it's no big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:46 am wonderluster wrote: Eva 04 wrote: I mean,it's no big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 7:43 pm I certainly hope so....I certainly do.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Sep 08, 2009 6:04 pm I only hope the roar is somewhat good in Rebuild.Been waiting for 1.0 to get dubbed so.Yeah.I hope it's somewhat good.If not,there's the Japanese option like I said if they put it in which I think they will.Wouldnt make much sense if they didnt.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Sep 09, 2009 1:53 am im failing to understand why we cant just have the ROAR from th Japanese track..

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 09, 2009 2:22 am EvaCub wrote: im failing to understand why we cant just have the ROAR from th Japanese track..

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Sep 09, 2009 11:49 am Disappoint! I really enjoy the one on the Japanese audio track... I remember when the audio leak of 1.0 dropped the best part listening to it was the bio mechanic ROAR

[]: Re: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Sep 09, 2009 1:10 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Anyway, I was thinking and what if that happens again in the Rebuild 1.0? Can anyone who has seen the English dub confirm this yet?

[]: Re: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Sep 09, 2009 5:15 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: I think it would be pretty corny to see Ramiel shrieking constantly for more than 12 seconds no?

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Wed Sep 09, 2009 7:35 pm Maybe it was added as an artistic motif, not a way to bail on making some new sound effects... I mean, EVERYTHING else was redone in 1.0 soundwise, and the production quality is phenomenal. I highly doubt this was done out of "laziness." They probably just thought it'd be neat

[]: Re: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Sep 09, 2009 7:52 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Anyway, I was thinking and what if that happens again in the Rebuild 1.0? Can anyone who has seen the English dub confirm this yet?

[]: Re: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 11, 2009 9:32 pm Eva 04 wrote: I agree that the Roar in the trailer sucked but unfortuantly,that might be the actual one.I mean,that roar just doesnt fit Eva 01 at all.I think they tried too hard with it.

[]: Re: OH NO! NOT MY LAZER DEATH SCREAM!? (Spoilers)             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Sep 12, 2009 1:15 am Oh,I hope not.Changing the Roar is one thing.But changing the music?Yeah.Gotta say.If they change the music that's in it,I'm going on strike or something.I hope that all this waiting for the dub wont turn out to be a waste.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Sep 12, 2009 4:38 pm Does Anno get control over the dub as well? Or only some things?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 12, 2009 5:56 pm I doubt FUNi will change the music.
